Portfolio

All Projects

01
AI-Based Retinal Image Analysis for Early Eye Disease Detection Live ↗

Analyzed 40,000 retinal images using a 2-stage deep learning pipeline with EfficientNet-B4, achieving 80.98% accuracy. Integrated FastAPI backend for real-time predictions and automated clinical report generation. Recognised by Dr. Agarwal's Institute of Optometry.

PythonEfficientNet-B4FastAPICNNDeep Learning
Live Demo ↗GitHub ↗
02
AI Natural Language to SQL Analytics Dashboard GenAI

Enterprise-grade analytics dashboard that converts plain English questions into live MySQL queries using Google Gemini 2.5 Flash. Features smart local fallback, persistent query history, and dynamic charts (Doughnut & Bar). Built with Flask, Python, and Vanilla JS.

PythonFlaskGemini 2.5 FlashMySQLNLPGenAI
GitHub ↗
03
Fake News Detection using NLP

Classifies news articles as Fake or Real using TF-IDF vectorization, Logistic Regression, and SVM. Achieves 98–99% accuracy on benchmark datasets with real-time prediction interface.

PythonNLPTF-IDFScikit-learnSVM
GitHub ↗
04
Fraud Detection System

ML-based fraud detection model using Python and classification algorithms to identify anomalous financial transactions with high precision. Built during AICTE-approved internship at Codec Technologies.

PythonScikit-learnClassificationFeature Engineering
GitHub ↗
05
Titanic Survival Prediction

Applied Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, and SVM to predict passenger survival. Random Forest achieved 100% accuracy; SVM achieved 98.8% F1-score. Includes rich visualisations: heatmaps, survival by gender, fare vs age.

PythonScikit-learnRandom ForestSVMEDA
GitHub ↗
06
Road Accident Severity & Safety Analytics Conference Paper

Analyzes Indian road accident data to identify accident-prone zones and contributing factors. Found most severe accidents occur during rush hours (8–10 AM, 5–8 PM). Presented at International Conference on Applied Mathematics & Data Science (Oct 2025).

PythonPandasMatplotlibSeabornEDA
GitHub ↗
07
Healthcare Analytics Tableau Dashboard

Interactive Tableau dashboard analyzing 55,000+ patient records. Covers KPI summary, admission trends, age/gender distribution, medical condition insights, billing analysis, and top-10 doctor performance comparison.

TableauHealthcare AnalyticsData Visualisation
GitHub ↗
08
Global Air Transportation Network Analysis

Analyzed 10,000+ flight records to map global connectivity patterns and high-traffic air corridors. Interactive Tableau dashboards for filtering routes by region, volume, and airline.

TableauNetwork AnalysisData Visualisation
GitHub ↗
09
Chocolate Sales Dashboard

Interactive sales analytics dashboard visualising chocolate product performance, revenue trends, and regional distribution insights to support business decision-making.

Data VisualisationSales AnalyticsDashboard
GitHub ↗
10
Website User Behaviour & Conversion Insights ML + BI

Analyzes website user behavior and conversion patterns using Python and Power BI. Covers most visited pages, traffic source analysis, device usage, scroll depth, and conversion rates. Includes bonus ML features: user segmentation, customer clustering, conversion prediction, and AI-generated business insights.

PythonPower BIPandasClusteringEDAJupyter
